summary: Added startup validation for security-critical environment variables in dashboard routes to warn operators of missing signing keys and write tokens

details.signing_key_validation: Added OPENCODE_EVENT_SIGNING_KEY validation in policy-sim/route.ts (warns if empty in production)
details.write_token_validation: Added OPENCODE_DASHBOARD_WRITE_TOKEN validation in write-access.ts (warns if not configured)
details.import_time_validation: Validations run at import time, not per-request
details.dev_compatibility: No errors thrown to preserve dev environment compatibility
